summary_en: 4,000,000 ordinary shares (7.41% of issued shares pre-cancellation) to be cancelled effective 2026-05-25. Post-cancellation issued shares: 50,000,000. Treasury shares post-cancellation: 9,899,056.
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares (Share Cancellation Based on Article 178 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Ryoyo Ryosan Holdings resolved at its board meeting on 2026-05-14 to cancel 4,000,000 ordinary shares held in treasury, representing 7.41% of issued shares outstanding prior to cancellation. The cancellation is to be executed on 2026-05-25 pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act. Following the cancellation, total issued shares will be reduced to 50,000,000, and treasury shares held will be 9,899,056 shares (calculated as of 2026-03-31).
